//: TEAM-SHARED, COMMITTED settings for AbrisTempo Local. Personal overrides go in
//3: An OPTIONAL permissions allowlist (to stop being prompted for routine build/test commands)
//4: is documented in .claude/README.md — paste it in yourself if you want it; it is left out
//5: here on purpose so this file never silently widens what the agent can auto-run.
//mcp: Auto-approve the angular-cli MCP server declared in .mcp.json so it loads without a
//mcp2: trust prompt. This is the 'angular is already there' wiring the team relies on.
//hooks: Deterministic automation — fires regardless of what the model remembers to do.
//hooks2: SessionStart injects the operating rules + lessons-learned into every session/subagent context.
//hooks3: PostToolUse reminds, after each edit, which skill/MCP/verification applies to that layer.
//hooks4: NOTE: keys inside 'hooks' must be valid event names — do not put '//'-comment keys there.
